use_cases: User authentication and login for web applications
Collecting email credentials in a visually polished form
Dark/light mode themed login for multi-purpose platforms
Animated entrance for premium app onboarding flows
Accessible form input with email validation pattern
ai_summary: A sleek login card component with glass-morphism styling and backdrop blur effects. Features animated entrance using Framer Motion with staggered reveals, dark mode support, and responsive design. Includes email input field with rounded-full styling and a call-to-action button with hover scale effects. Optimized for authentication flows in modern SaaS and web applications.
